key_finding: The original +23.5pp destruction dissociation on Qwen-Base (exp_004) is ALSO primarily a positional confound. Position dominates (+65.8pp gap). Within-early-half gap collapses to 2.6pp. BUT within-late-half gap persists (42.1pp), with cross-strategy evidence of genuine selectivity at similar positions. Partial confound: position explains ≥70%, selectivity adds genuine residual value in late half. ALL destruction-based dissociations across ALL models are now shown to be primarily positional. Only PGD rho=0.78 provides position-independent spatial structure evidence.
evidence_impact: Major revision: (1) The foundational +23.5pp dissociation from exp_004 is primarily positional — completing the confound analysis across all tested models. (2) Within-late-half genuine selectivity effect is consistent with PGD rho=0.78. (3) SEL-position correlation reverses between Base (-0.201) and Instruct (+0.650) — different attention patterns produce the same confound pattern. (4) The '~24pp replicated across architectures' finding was primarily positional sensitivity, not functional separability.
next_planned: Position-controlled PGD analysis: verify that PGD perturbation-attention correlation (rho=0.78) survives partial correlation controlling for position — the single most important remaining question. Alternatively, quartile-level position-controlled selectivity analysis for definitive separation of position and selectivity effects.
open_questions_answered: Q49: Qwen-Base destruction dissociation is partial positional confound
new_open_questions: Q51: why SEL-pos reversal between Base/Instruct?
Q52: does PGD rho=0.78 survive position-partial-correlation?
Q53: why late-half AC-selective positions more critical?

null_space_existence.status: strong (PGD only — destruction method is positionally confounded)

spatial_structure.status: PGD rho=0.78 genuine, all destruction-based evidence primarily positional. Residual selectivity in late half on Qwen-Base.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection works via position (all models). Not channel-specific

cross_model_replication.status: Position dominates on ALL models (Qwen-Base, Qwen-Instruct, Llama-Instruct). Only PGD works on Qwen-Base

encoding_strategy.status: Position-universal (all models share early-position sensitivity). PGD-validated concentrated encoding unique to Qwen-Base
